stories.title: Row version not incremented on PUT
stories.bug_description: Custom routers in api/routers/ don't increment row_version on writes, violating FK-ENHANCEMENT spec. Should match base_layer.py behavior.

a_phase.goal: Why don't custom routers increment row_version like base_layer does?
a_phase.data_model_query: GET /model/endpoints/?limit=1 to review actual endpoint schema
a_phase.expected_output: RCA markdown explaining the missing increment logic

c_phase.goal: Create test that fails if row_version not incremented

stories.title: Endpoint field format mismatch in validation script
stories.bug_description: validate-all-refs.py accesses ep['method'] and ep['path'] which don't exist. Data model endpoints use single 'id' field (e.g., 'GET /v1/health').

a_phase.goal: Why does the script assume method/path fields that don't exist?
a_phase.data_model_query: GET /model/endpoints/?limit=3 to see actual endpoint structure

b_phase.goal: Use endpoint['id'] instead of splitting method/path

c_phase.goal: Test endpoint schema access is correct

stories.title: Missing api.cosmos module import error
stories.bug_description: Routers import 'from api.cosmos import store' but api.cosmos module doesn't exist in the repo. This makes all routers unimportable.

a_phase.goal: Does api.cosmos exist? If not, what module should be imported instead?
a_phase.expected_output: RCA identifying whether to create api/cosmos.py or use api.store.base.AbstractStore

b_phase.goal: Either create api/cosmos.py with CosmosStore OR update routers to use AbstractStore
b_phase.option_2: Update routers: from api.store.base import AbstractStore; store = AbstractStore()

c_phase.goal: Test all routers can be imported without module errors

execution_plan.trigger: GitHub issue labeled 'bug-fix' with this manifest
success_criteria: All 3 bugs get RCA analysis (Phase A complete)
All 3 bugs get fixes applied (Phase B complete)
All 3 bugs get prevention tests (Phase C complete)
9 commits created (3 per bug: A, B, C)

notes: Sprint 0.5 is a proof-of-concept for the bug-fix-automation skill. It takes the 3 real bugs from PR #2 review and processes them through the DPDCA loop (Discover RCA → Do Fix → Act Prevent). All work is tracked in .eva/evidence/ for audit trail.
